perturbation.original_text: All correspondence, inquiries, and offers to purchase, and other documents relating to the Business or Transaction (all of which is “Confidential Information) will be delivered solely through Broker , and all negotiations relating to the Business or Transaction will be conducted exclusively through Broker.
perturbation.changed_text: All correspondence, inquiries, and offers to purchase, and other documents relating to the Business or Transaction (all of which is “Confidential Information) will be delivered directly to the Seller , and all negotiations relating to the Business or Transaction will be conducted directly with the Seller.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that all communication and negotiations must go through the Broker. The changed text states that they will be delivered and conducted directly with the Seller, creating an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All correspondence, inquiries, and offers to purchase, and other documents relating to the Business or Transaction (all of which is “Confidential Information) will be delivered directly to the Seller , and all negotiations relating to the Business or Transaction will be conducted directly with the Seller.
perturbation.justification: The original text requires all communication to go through the Broker, while the changed text specifies direct communication with the Seller. The contradicted text repeats the changed text, indicating all communication should be directly with the seller. This creates a direct conflict because the original text mandated the Broker as the intermediary, which is now completely bypassed, resulting in a strong in-text contradiction. The perturbation explanation and the Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction definition confirms the contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: USE INFORMATION FOR EVALUATION PURPOSE ONLY Without limiting the other restrictions in this agreement, Buyer agrees to use Confidential Information solely to internally evaluate the Business for the possible Transaction and not for any other purposes whatsoever.
perturbation.changed_text: USE INFORMATION FOR ANY PURPOSE The Buyer has the right to use the confidential information not only to evaluate the business for the possible transaction but also for any other purpose.
perturbation.explanation: The original text restricts the use of confidential information to internal evaluation for a possible transaction. The changed text states that the buyer can use the information for any purpose whatsoever. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding the permissible use of confidential information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: USE INFORMATION FOR ANY PURPOSE The Buyer has the right to use the confidential information not only to evaluate the business for the possible transaction but also for any other purpose.
perturbation.justification: The original text restricts the use of confidential information to a specific purpose (internal evaluation), whereas the changed text expands the use of confidential information to 'any purpose whatsoever'. This directly contradicts the original limitation, creating an in-text contradiction. The contradicted text is exactly the same as the changed text, but the change created a contradiction with the original text.

perturbation.original_text: DO NOT CIRCUMVENT SELLER AND /OR BROKER Buyer will not circumvent Seller and/or Broker by contacting any person or persons involved with the Business including, without limitation , landlords, employees, suppliers or customers .
perturbation.changed_text: The buyer can directly contact any person or persons involved with the Business including, without limitation , landlords, employees, suppliers or customers.
perturbation.explanation: The original text prohibits the buyer from circumventing the Seller and/or Broker by contacting individuals involved with the business. The changed text explicitly allows direct contact, creating a direct contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The buyer can directly contact any person or persons involved with the Business including, without limitation , landlords, employees, suppliers or customers.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly prohibits the buyer from contacting individuals involved with the business. The changed text explicitly allows the buyer to contact these same individuals. This creates a direct and undeniable contradiction with the contradicted text, as it also explicitly allows the buyer to contact these same individuals, which is against the original text. The change introduces a conflicting obligation, making it unclear whether the buyer is allowed to contact people involved with the business. This is exactly what the definition of a Structural Flaw - In Text Contradiction states.

perturbation.original_text: Buyer will not rely on the information provided by Broker or Seller , including the Confidential Information , but shall conduct its own independen t due diligence .
perturbation.changed_text: Buyer will rely on the information provided by Broker or Seller, including the Confidential Information, and is not required to conduct its own independent due diligence.
perturbation.explanation: The original text requires the buyer to conduct their own due diligence and not rely on the information provided by the Broker or Seller. The changed text states that the buyer will rely on the provided information and is not required to conduct due diligence. This is a clear in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Buyer will rely on the information provided by Broker or Seller, including the Confidential Information, and is not required to conduct its own independent due diligence.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states the buyer *will* rely on the information provided by the broker or seller and *is not* required to conduct their own due diligence. The contradicted text is identical to the changed text. The original text stated the buyer *will not* rely on the broker/seller's information and *shall* conduct their own due diligence. This change directly contradicts the original intent by inverting the buyer's responsibilities, creating a clear in-text contradiction. The buyer is now both required to and not required to do due diligence. The buyer is now both allowed to rely on the broker/seller's information and is not allowed to. This creates a structural flaw and an in-text contradiction.
